title: Elephant Jelly
description: Lather this limited-edition elephant-shaped shower jelly for washes that help to fund the creation of a wildlife corridor to protect threatened mammals in Cameroon.
ingredients: Cymbopogon Flexuosus Herb Extract (Fresh Lemongrass Extract)
Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Fruit Oil (Bergamot Oil)
Piper Nigrum Fruit Oil (Black Pepper Oil)

images.alt: Elephant Jelly. A fun, gelatinous, Lush shower jelly in the shape of an elephant's face, complete with large ears, long trunk and tusks, in a metallic silver colour.

The image shows a pair of light-toned hands reaching in from the right. They are cupped and gently holding the metallic silver Elephant Jelly in their hands. The background is a solid yellow with blurred water droplets falling.

The image shows a blonde, smiling model in the shower, from the shoulders up. They are using a metallic silver elephant jelly to wash their shoulder. Water droplets and suds are visible on their skin, and the background is a solid bright yellow.
